title: Chain Directory in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/chain' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains classes that enable chaining multiple Mappers or a Mapper followed by a Reducer within a single Map or Reduce task. The key files include Chain.java, which defines a Chain class for managing chains of Mappers and a single Reducer, ChainMapContextImpl and ChainReduceContextImpl, which extend Map and Reduce contexts respectively, and ChainMapper and ChainReducer, which facilitate chaining Mappers after a Reducer. These classes collaborate to manage the execution of chained tasks, handle input/output, and ensure compatibility between consecutive tasks in the chain, thereby extending the functionality of Hadoop MapReduce.

TITLE: Chain Directory in Hadoop MapReduce

DESCRIPTION:
The 'lib/chain' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains classes that enable chaining multiple Mappers or a Mapper followed by a Reducer within a single Map or Reduce task. The key files include Chain.java, which defines a Chain class for managing chains of Mappers and a single Reducer, ChainMapContextImpl and ChainReduceContextImpl, which extend Map and Reduce contexts respectively, and ChainMapper and ChainReducer, which facilitate chaining Mappers after a Reducer. These classes collaborate to manage the execution of chained tasks, handle input/output, and ensure compatibility between consecutive tasks in the chain, thereby extending the functionality of Hadoop MapReduce.
